title: Flint Flamer Menus
description: From the hottest buttons on the home screen to the brightest icons. This shows the light to find the perfect settings.
body:
resourcepack by: FlorFlamer
___
![Flint Flamer Menus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d79c488515ce2c6a683752bdd4a51b924764808.png)
![Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83be81680a7fdb33fe3cdb110f9dd284b67cdedf.png)

___

## 💥 | Important !!!

The recorce pack only works 100% if you run it in English (US).

_New supported languages will be added over time._

PS: There will be an orange text and a flag above, but this does not activate the resorce pack 100%, only the option below will activate it.

___

## ※ Information:

Backgrounds, Buttons, Titles and much more, just try not to let your eyes burn with so much beauty. PS: No chance of eye burns...

All the buttons have a different look (even the ones on some mods) ┏ (゜ω゜)=☞ ⨀

> 🟦 Butons | Classic design and fewer textures
> 
> 🔤 Butons Text | Colors and icons have been added
> 
> 🏁 Language | Now with Flags
> 
> 👤 SinglePlayer Menus | Added more icon colors and details in general
> 
> 👥 MultiPlayer Menus | Added more icon colors and details in general
> 
> 🔛 F3 + F4 Menu | Added icons colors and new menu
___

## ↈ FAQ:

### 💫 | Problems...

<details>
<summary>Mod not working</summary>

Fabric and forge files (mods) can sometimes take priority in the list of recorce packs (even if they don't appear in it).

To check if there is a problem please try placing this Recorce pack at the top of the list, if it doesn't work please contact me

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mod not supported</summary>

This texture pack alters the base of only a few mod textures, so in order to modify a specific mod, Floros will have to study the mod's base files, modify them and add them to the Resource Pack.

If you have any mods that you'd like me to modify to add to the Resource Pack, try connecting them to me.

</details>

___

<details>
<summary>[CC] Terms Of Us</summary>

😠_ Serious mode activated_

> By using this resource pack, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions
> 
> FlorFlamer is the creator and copyright owner of this resource pack
> 
> These terms are subject to change at any time
> 
> The creator has the final say about which terms apply to your use of this resource pack and its assets
> 
<details>
<summary>✅ YOU MAY</summary>

- Use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts

- Redesign assets based on original files (but you will need to identify the original pack)

- Add new changes to adjust the texture pack (I also ask if it is possible to show me the changes made, I can even add to the original pack and put your name in the credits, if I like it a lot.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🛑 YOU MAY NOT</summary>

- Redistribute this resource pack

- Port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition (I have plans for the future...)

- Include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission from the creator

</details>



</details>
